system.damage: spear d8 (_close_, _thrown_, 1 piercing) or bow d8 (_near_)

selected: to make the best out of what they’ve got

system.moves:
- Suss out what people want or need
- Exploit a weakness, opportunity, or loophole
- Cut a deal
- Ruthlessly expand/preserve their power

Most bandit gangs struggle to find victims or shelter or both, and quickly die out or disband. The clever ones last a few seasons, but eventually folk catch wise and grow wary, and the bandits’ schemes start to fail. But every generation or so, a leader crops up who’s cagey enough to turn a gang of bandits into a serious threat. What does the chief possess that makes them such a threat? (pick 2 or 3) Agents in Gordin’s Delve and/or Marshedge A way to overcome the wards on the Roads Magic that can compel/lure/scare travelers off the Roads Magic that hides their crew, or changes their appearance Well-trained horses, or some other form of mobility A fortified hideout
